name: linear-orchestration
description: Linear-backed task orchestration: grill a task to a spec, set up a per-repo Linear project (the epic) with milestones (phases) and issues (chunks), then dispatch self-managing worker subagents that build their chunk, run their own code-standards + review loop (spawning a checker and a tier-by-complexity reviewer), and post their own Linear updates (attempt-then-relay; the orchestrator is writer of last resort). Everything addressed by explicit ID for concurrent multi-project safety. Engages via skill-discovery on matching non-trivial tasks.
